data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"2c28-e5b9","generatedAt":"2026-04-16T16:25:00Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Ticket system core query layer: next-batch, list-descendants, list-epics, exists","description":"Adds four high-value ticket CLI subcommands to eliminate direct .tickets-tracker/ access. Purely additive (caller migration is Epic e1b2-2653's concern).","successCriteria":["Four new subcommands callable via dispatcher: next-batch, list-descendants, list-epics, exists with preserved exit codes, JSON schemas, and output tokens.","Each subcommand has an integration test exercising the CLI dispatcher against a synthetic .tickets-tracker/ fixture.","Script author can retrieve results via CLI only without knowledge of .tickets-tracker/ layout."]},"stories":[{"id":"4c60-5e2e","title":"As a DSO plugin developer, I can check if a ticket exists via the CLI in sub-millisecond time","description":"Add ticket exists <id> subcommand: directory + CREATE-file presence check, no reducer invocation, sub-10ms SLO. See ticket comments for adversarial-review DoD updates (archived-ticket semantics, perf SLO clarification).","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["ticket exists <id> returns exit 0 for existing tickets, non-zero for missing","Sub-10ms lookup benchmarked and documented","Integration test against synthetic fixture via CLI dispatcher","Unit tests pass for all new logic","(Updated via review) Archived tickets return 0; perf SLO is sub-10ms enforceable"],"considerations":["[Performance] Avoid reducer invocation for sub-ms target","[Testing] Follow test-sprint-next-batch.sh fixture pattern"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"exists (O(1) ticket existence check via directory + CREATE-file presence without invoking the reducer)"},{"id":"df2e-6fdd","title":"As a DSO plugin developer, I can list epics with blocking status via the CLI","description":"Add ticket list-epics subcommand replacing sprint-list-epics.sh. See ticket comments for adversarial-review DoD updates (P*, BLOCKING, P0 bug header, 3-valued exit codes, --min-children, --all).","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Tab-separated output with epic_id, title, priority, child_count, blocker_ids","Output byte-for-byte equivalent to sprint-list-epics.sh on same fixture","Integration test via CLI dispatcher","Unit tests pass","(Updated via review) Support P*, BLOCKING column, P0 bug header block, --min-children, --all, three-valued exit code"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Follow existing ticket-*.sh dispatcher pattern","[Testing] Diff output against sprint-list-epics.sh on same fixture"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"list-epics (epic listing with blocking status, child counts, priority sorting)"},{"id":"99aa-ccf0","title":"As a DSO plugin developer, I can walk ticket hierarchies via the CLI","description":"Add ticket list-descendants <id> subcommand: BFS traversal returning JSON object keyed by tier. See ticket comments for adversarial-review DoD updates (parents_with_children predicate).","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["JSON object keyed by tier (epics/stories/tasks/bugs) with descendant IDs","BFS traversal verified on multi-level fixture","Integration test via CLI dispatcher","Unit tests pass","(Updated via review) Expose parents_with_children predicate or per-node has_children booleans"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Reuse ticket-reducer.py hierarchy walk helpers if available","[Testing] Multi-level fixture (epic to story to task) for tier bucketing"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"list-descendants (BFS tree walk returning child IDs by tier)"},{"id":"958a-66ac","title":"As a DSO plugin developer, I can select the next sprint batch via the CLI","description":"Add ticket next-batch subcommand replacing sprint-next-batch.sh. See ticket comments for adversarial-review DoD updates (all 6 SKIPPED_* tokens, full --json schema, OPUS_CAP + OVERLAP_SAFE_FILES + stderr conflict matrix preservation).","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Produces same batch selection as sprint-next-batch.sh given identical fixture","Blocked story's child tasks excluded from batch (integration test)","Overlapping files produce exactly one SKIPPED_OVERLAP (integration test)","Unit tests pass","(Updated via review) Preserve all 6 SKIPPED_* tokens, EPIC:/AVAILABLE_POOL:/BATCH_SIZE:/TASK: formats, full --json schema, OPUS_CAP, OVERLAP_SAFE_FILES, stderr conflict matrix"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Preserve all SKIPPED_* output tokens and --json schema for write-blackboard.sh","[Reliability] Preserve OPUS_CAP, OVERLAP_SAFE_FILES, stderr conflict matrix","[Testing] Follow test-sprint-next-batch.sh pattern","[Reliability] Depends on list-descendants for BFS"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["99aa-ccf0"],"satisfiesCriterion":"next-batch (batch selection with hierarchy walk, blocking checks, file-overlap serialization, greedy selection)"},{"id":"b2d2-e34e","title":"Update project docs to reflect ticket CLI core query layer additions","description":"Update existing project documentation to reflect the four new ticket CLI subcommands. See ticket comments for adversarial-review consideration (expanded docs surface).","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["ticket-cli-reference.md has full entries for each new subcommand","CLAUDE.md Quick Reference reflects the four new subcommands","Dispatcher _usage() help text includes the four new subcommands"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md","[Docs] Surfaces: ticket-cli-reference.md, CLAUDE.md, llms.txt, ticket-system-v3-architecture.md, dispatcher _usage()"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["4c60-5e2e","df2e-6fdd","99aa-ccf0","958a-66ac"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Script author can retrieve next-batch, list-descendants, list-epics, and exists results using only ticket CLI commands"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":5,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["99aa-ccf0","958a-66ac","b2d2-e34e"]}}
